# Samuel Rizzon - Complete Profile

URL: https://samuelrizzon.dev

---

## About

Samuel Rizzon is a Product Engineer with 10 years of experience building consumer web products, from enterprise platforms to solo-shipped products with real users and revenue.

He has built products used by 100K+ people, shipped a SaaS to $1K MRR in one month, co-founded an open-source library with 939 GitHub stars, and published a research paper at Oxford.

He is a power user of Claude Code, having built 10+ projects with it and created dozens of custom skills and workflows.

## Contact Information

- Full Name: Samuel Rizzon
- Email: hello@samuelrizzon.dev
- Phone: +55 31 98390-6251
- Location: Brazil (open to relocate to the US)
- Languages: Portuguese (native), English (fluent - 3+ years working daily for a US company)
- Social handle: @samuelrizzondev (across all platforms)

---

## Projects

### Git City
- URL: https://thegitcity.com
- Period: February 2026 - Present
- Description: A 3D pixel art city rendered in the browser where every building represents a real GitHub developer. Height maps to contributions, width to repositories, lit windows to recent activity. Built 100% with Claude Code as a solo developer.
- Key Metrics:
  - 100K+ unique visitors in 18 days
  - 350K+ pageviews
  - 21.5% bounce rate
  - 134 paid ads sold
  - $885 ad revenue
  - 67K+ 3D buildings rendered at 60fps via WebGL instanced rendering
  - Zero marketing spend, 100% organic growth
- Features: XP system with 25 levels, PvP raids, daily missions, 46+ achievements, multiplayer arcade, self-service 3D ad platform (planes, blimps, billboards), real-time presence, cosmetic shop, referral system, VSCode extension
- Tech Stack: Next.js App Router, Three.js, React Three Fiber, TypeScript, Supabase (Postgres + Auth + Realtime), Stripe, AbacatePay, Vercel
- Community: Discord with 359 members

### Reply-OS
- URL: https://reply-os.com
- Period: 2026
- Description: AI-powered SaaS for X/Twitter engagement automation. Built in one week, reached $1K MRR within one month.
- Features: AI ghostwriter, smart feed curation, viral content library with 500+ analyzed posts, analytics dashboard
- Pricing: $9-19/month
- Tech Stack: Next.js, AI/LLM, Stripe, TypeScript

### ZardUI
- URL: https://zardui.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/zard-ui/zardui
- Period: 2024 - 2025
- Description: Open-source Angular component library. Co-founded. The shadcn/ui equivalent for Angular.
- Key Metrics: 939 GitHub stars, 30+ production-ready components
- Features: Tree-shakable, TypeScript-first, Tailwind CSS, dark mode support
- Tech Stack: Angular, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

### Chrome Extension
- Period: 2020 - 2021
- Description: Chrome extension built during the pandemic that reached 150K+ active users. Allowed users to mute other users on web platforms. Sold for $2,000 USD after one year of organic growth.
- Tech Stack: JavaScript, Chrome APIs

---

## Professional Experience

### Blackthorn.io - Full-Stack Developer (Remote)
- Period: January 2023 - Present
- Location: New York, NY (Remote from Brazil)
- Details: Works in English daily across US time zones
- Achievements:
  - Led the complete UX/UI redesign of an e-commerce system integrated with Salesforce
  - Created a CLI tool to automate release creation, saving the team one full day per release cycle
  - Built and maintained web systems using Angular and Node.js

### CI&T - Senior Frontend Developer
- Period: April 2022 - January 2023
- Location: Campinas, Brazil (Remote)
- Achievements:
  - Led frontend development for Ford's F-150 pre-sale launch in Brazil, architecting the system from scratch
  - Built a scalable multi-language platform with marketing tracking integration
  - Started a component library in Angular aligned with Ford's Design System

### TOTVS - Frontend Developer
- Period: December 2016 - March 2022 (5 years 4 months)
- Location: Belo Horizonte, Brazil
- Achievements:
  - Sole frontend developer for TOTVS Electronic Signature product
  - Designed the full UI in Figma, built it in Angular from scratch
  - Developed a Chrome extension + Windows app for A1/A3 digital certificate signing (ICP-Brasil standard), reaching 150K+ users
  - Engineered complex state management ensuring zero data loss on page reload or unexpected exits
  - Product passed all load tests and OWASP Top-10 pentesting with zero vulnerabilities
  - Mentored junior frontend developers through pair programming
  - Earlier role: built RESTful APIs and web systems for SEBRAE Nacional using ASP.NET and C#

---

## Skills

- Frontend: React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, Three.js, Tailwind CSS, HTML/CSS
- Backend: Node.js, C#, ASP.NET, REST APIs
- Infrastructure: Supabase, PostgreSQL, Docker, Vercel
- Payments: Stripe, AbacatePay
- Tools: Figma, Git, Claude Code, GitHub Actions

## Education

- Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Centro Universitario de Belo Horizonte (UniBH), 2015-2018
- Technical Degree in IT, UniBH, 2014-2015

## Publication

"Monitoring the Efficiency of Brazilian University Education through Based Solutions and Mobile Applications"
Samuel H. Rizzon et al. | Published at Oxford | 2020

## Content Creation

Content creator with 11K+ followers total across YouTube (3K), Instagram (3.5K), X/Twitter (3.5K), and TikTok (1.5K). Focused on AI tools, Claude Code, and building products as a solo developer.
